stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
For an aircraft making an approach to an airfield located in square 3B, away from the vicinity of the fronts, the most likely weather conditions in winter are:

options.a: generally overcast, moderate continuous rain and risk of low level wind shear
options.b: prolonged periods of heavy rain and hail
options.c: poor visibility in mist and drizzle
options.d: scattered SC and CU, good visibility
